requirement_topic.en: Toy Safety Standard — ASTM F963 (Mandatory under CPSIA)
requirement_topic.zh: 玩具安全标准——ASTM F963（CPSIA强制要求）
requirement_topic.zht: 玩具安全標準——ASTM F963（CPSIA強制要求）

summary.en: ASTM F963, Standard Consumer Safety Specification for Toy Safety, is mandated as a federal mandatory toy safety standard under Section 106 of the Consumer Product Safety Improvement Act (CPSIA), codified at 16 CFR Part 1250. ASTM F963-23 applies under 16 CFR 1250.2. 16 CFR 1250.4 now adds water-bead toy requirements (amended 12 Dec 2025). The standard covers mechanical and physical properties (sharp edges, sharp points, small parts, cords), flammability, electrical safety, thermal properties, chemical properties, acoustics, and age grading. All toys sold in the United States for children under 14 must comply. The CPSC enforces the standard through market surveillance, recalls, and civil penalties.
summary.zh: ASTM F963《玩具安全消费者安全规范》依据《消费品安全改进法》（CPSIA）第106条成为联邦强制玩具安全标准，编入《联邦法规汇编》16 CFR第1250部分。ASTM F963-23依据16 CFR 1250.2适用。16 CFR 1250.4现新增水珠玩具要求（2025年12月12日修订）。该标准涵盖机械及物理性能（锐利边缘、锐利尖端、小零件、拉绳）、阻燃性、电气安全、热性能、化学性能、声学及年龄分级。所有在美国面向14岁以下儿童销售的玩具均须符合本标准。CPSC通过市场监督、召回及民事处罚执行该标准。
summary.zht: ASTM F963《玩具安全消費者安全規範》依據《消費品安全改進法》（CPSIA）第106條成為聯邦強制玩具安全標準，編入《聯邦法規彙編》16 CFR第1250部分。ASTM F963-23依據16 CFR 1250.2適用。16 CFR 1250.4現新增水珠玩具要求（2025年12月12日修訂）。該標準涵蓋機械及物理性能（銳利邊緣、銳利尖端、小零件、拉繩）、阻燃性、電氣安全、熱性能、化學性能、聲學及年齡分級。所有在美國面向14歲以下兒童銷售的玩具均須符合本標準。CPSC通過市場監督、召回及民事處罰執行該標準。

standards_or_laws: CPSIA Section 106 (15 U.S.C. § 2056b) — mandates ASTM F963 as federal toy safety standard
16 CFR Part 1250 — Mandatory Toy Safety Standard (ASTM F963)
ASTM F963-23 — Standard Consumer Safety Specification for Toy Safety (current edition)

summary.en: China's toy safety regime is governed by the GB 6675 series: GB 6675.1-2014 (General requirements), GB 6675.2-2014 (Mechanical and physical properties), GB 6675.3-2014 (Flammability), and GB 6675.4-2014 (Chemical properties). These are mandatory national standards enforced under the compulsory certification (CCC) system administered by CNCA/SAMR for toys sold in China. GB 6675 is largely harmonised with ISO 8124, not ASTM F963. GB 6675 certification from a Chinese CCC-authorised laboratory is NOT accepted as demonstrating compliance with ASTM F963 under the CPSC/CPSIA framework. Separate third-party testing to ASTM F963 by a CPSC-accepted lab is required for US market entry.
summary.zh: 中国玩具安全制度由GB 6675系列标准规范：GB 6675.1-2014（通用要求）、GB 6675.2-2014（机械和物理性能）、GB 6675.3-2014（燃烧性能）和GB 6675.4-2014（化学性能）。上述标准为在中国销售玩具所须符合的强制性国家标准，由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）/国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）通过强制性产品认证（CCC）体系执行。GB 6675主要与ISO 8124协调，而非ASTM F963。依据GB 6675由中国CCC授权实验室出具的认证，不被CPSC/CPSIA框架接受为符合ASTM F963的证明；进入美国市场须由CPSC认可实验室单独进行ASTM F963第三方检测。
summary.zht: 中國玩具安全制度由GB 6675系列標準規範：GB 6675.1-2014（通用要求）、GB 6675.2-2014（機械和物理性能）、GB 6675.3-2014（燃燒性能）和GB 6675.4-2014（化學性能）。上述標準為在中國銷售玩具所須符合的強制性國家標準，由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）/國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）通過強制性產品認證（CCC）體系執行。GB 6675主要與ISO 8124協調，而非ASTM F963。依據GB 6675由中國CCC授權實驗室出具的認證，不被CPSC/CPSIA框架接受為符合ASTM F963的證明；進入美國市場須由CPSC認可實驗室單獨進行ASTM F963第三方檢測。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.1-2014 — Toy Safety Part 1: General requirements (mandatory, CCC)
GB 6675.2-2014 — Toy Safety Part 2: Mechanical and physical properties (mandatory, CCC)
GB 6675.3-2014 — Toy Safety Part 3: Flammability (mandatory, CCC)
GB 6675.4-2014 — Toy Safety Part 4: Chemical properties (mandatory, CCC)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers holding GB 6675 / CCC certification must obtain separate ASTM F963-23 testing from a CPSC-accepted third-party laboratory (accredited under 16 CFR Part 1112). Unlike CE marking in the EU, there is no recognised mutual acceptance of test reports between the US and Chinese toy testing regimes. Specific technical gaps include: ASTM F963 hazardous substance limits (e.g., antimony, arsenic, barium, cadmium, chromium, lead, mercury, selenium in surface coatings) differ from GB 6675 limits; ASTM F963 cords/strings/elastics/ribbons requirements differ from GB 6675.2; and the ASTM F963 flammability test methodology differs from GB 6675.3.
gap.zh: 持有GB 6675 / CCC认证的中国制造商须由CPSC认可的第三方实验室（依据16 CFR第1112部分取得认可）重新进行ASTM F963-23检测。与欧盟CE标志不同，美中玩具检测制度之间没有公认的检测报告互认机制。具体技术差距包括：ASTM F963有害物质限量（如表面涂层中的锑、砷、钡、镉、铬、铅、汞、硒）与GB 6675限量不同；ASTM F963绳索/弦线/弹力带/丝带要求与GB 6675.2存在差异；ASTM F963燃烧性能试验方法与GB 6675.3有所不同。
gap.zht: 持有GB 6675 / CCC認證的中國製造商須由CPSC認可的第三方實驗室（依據16 CFR第1112部分取得認可）重新進行ASTM F963-23檢測。與歐盟CE標誌不同，美中玩具檢測制度之間沒有公認的檢測報告互認機制。具體技術差距包括：ASTM F963有害物質限量（如表面塗層中的銻、砷、鋇、鎘、鉻、鉛、汞、硒）與GB 6675限量不同；ASTM F963繩索/弦線/彈力帶/絲帶要求與GB 6675.2存在差異；ASTM F963燃燒性能試驗方法與GB 6675.3有所不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ASTM F963 compliance required for all toys sold in the US for children under 14 under CPSIA Section 106 / 16 CFR Part 1250; third-party testing and Children's Product Certificate (CPC) required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 6675 series compliance required under CCC certification framework (CNCA) for toys sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ASTM F963 compliance is federally mandatory for all toys sold in the US for children under 14. Chinese GB 6675/CCC certification does not substitute for ASTM F963 third-party testing. Exporters must engage a CPSC-accepted laboratory, obtain a Children's Product Certificate (CPC), and maintain test records. Non-compliance can result in mandatory recalls, civil penalties up to US$100,000 per violation, and import detention at US Customs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】ASTM F963合规对在美销售的14岁以下儿童玩具为联邦强制要求。中国GB 6675/CCC认证不能替代ASTM F963第三方检测。出口商须委托CPSC认可实验室、获取儿童产品证书（CPC）并留存检测记录。不合规可能导致强制召回、每次违规最高10万美元的民事处罚及美国海关扣押进口货物。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】ASTM F963合規對在美銷售的14歲以下兒童玩具為聯邦強制要求。中國GB 6675/CCC認證不能替代ASTM F963第三方檢測。出口商須委託CPSC認可實驗室、取得兒童產品證書（CPC）並留存檢測記錄。不合規可能導致強制召回、每次違規最高10萬美元的民事處罰及美國海關扣押進口貨物。

source.publisher: Electronic Code of Federal Regulations (eCFR) — 16 CFR Part 1250
